## Evidence

- Tests or positive fixtures added:
- Commands run:
- Package dry-run checked when release surface changed:

## Contract Check

- [ ] No local ignore path or per-project setting was introduced.
- [ ] No rejected-shape fixture root or diagnostic-output catalog was introduced.
- [ ] Analyzer behavior changes are grounded in ADR-0001 or a newer accepted ADR.
- [ ] Public wording describes source structure only, not style, security, runtime behavior, or API quality.
